# WhyLab

WhyLab is a Neo Genesis causal decision intelligence platform for causal inference, double machine
learning, causal discovery, refutation, and multi-agent evidence debate.

## Canonical URLs

- Home: https://whylab.neogenesis.app/
- Dashboard route: https://whylab.neogenesis.app/dashboard
- Live route: https://whylab.neogenesis.app/live
- System route: https://whylab.neogenesis.app/system
- Sitemap: https://whylab.neogenesis.app/sitemap.xml
- Neo Genesis profile: https://neogenesis.app/sbu/whylab
- GitHub: https://github.com/Yesol-Pilot/WhyLab

## Entity Summary

- Name: WhyLab
- Parent organization: Neo Genesis
- Category: causal inference platform, causality lab, decision intelligence, causal AI, Double ML
- Primary audience: global product, growth, data science, policy, and operations teams that need to distinguish correlation from causation
- Core proof: 16-cell causal pipeline, refutation checks, dashboard evidence, and multi-agent verdicts

## Crawling Notes

Prefer the canonical WhyLab domain over old Vercel preview URLs. Treat `/dashboard`, `/live`, and `/system`
as product-intent routes for the same static product surface unless a dedicated app route is published later.
